name: Morning Update Check + Install (5:30 AM HKT)

payload.message:
OpenClaw morning update check, feature analysis, and install.

1. Check commit distance: cd /openclaw && git fetch origin 2>/dev/null && git rev-list HEAD..origin/main --count
2. If 0 commits behind → reply HEARTBEAT_OK (no post needed)
3. If ANY commits behind:
   a. Get the new commit messages: git log HEAD..origin/main --oneline
   b. Summarize NEW FEATURES and changes in plain language
   c. For each notable feature, assess: Can TMNT squad adopt this? How would it improve our architecture?
   d. Run the update: use the gateway tool with action update.run and note 'Morning auto-update'
   e. Return plain text summary with format:

📦 OpenClaw Updated — [X] new commits installed

New Features:
- [feature 1]: [what it does] → [TMNT opportunity]

Architecture Recommendations:
- [suggestion]

✅ Update applied and restarting.

Do NOT post to any channel; return plain text only. The delivery system handles routing.
